problem_statement: Given a Binary Tree, return the Vertical Order Traversal of it starting from the Leftmost level to the Rightmost level. If there are multiple nodes passing through a vertical line, then they should be printed as they appear in level order traversal of the tree.

examples.explanation: Vertical Levels from left to right:Level -2: [4],Level -1: [2],Level 0: [1, 10, 9, 6] (Overlapping nodes are added in their level order sequence),Level 1: [3],Level 2: [11],
Vertical Levels from left to right:Level -2: [2],Level -1: [7, 5],Level 0: [2, 6],Level 1: [5, 11, 4] (Overlapping nodes are added in their level order sequence),Level 2: [9].
